title: Sync user guide with Type/Keys UI and document the Keys pad before release
action: Docs sync for the terminal UI: rename the Reply button to Type in README and usage.md, document the previously-undocumented Keys pad (arrow/Enter/Esc menu driving + Type<->Keys switch), note that opening a bottom panel scrolls the screen up so the prompt stays visible, and reflect that Press Enter (submit) now defaults on.

truths: No live user-facing doc calls the bottom-bar button Reply
usage.md and README name Type and Keys accurately
Press Enter default-checked is described correctly
prohibitions: Do not edit archival docs/history/** records
Do not change install steps or config tables

verify: grep -n Reply README.md docs/usage.md (expect none) + internal links resolve

trace.outcome: User guide synced to Type/Keys UI; Keys pad documented; Enter-submit default noted
trace.verify_output: no matches in README.md or docs/usage.md; internal links (deployment.md, usage.md, LICENSE) resolve; Keys pad section added
